## Change Summary

This scope declaration covers the governance hardening changes for Post-Token Final-State Normalization. Changes made:

1. **governance/checklists/execution-ceremony-admin-anti-patterns.md** (v1.1.0 → v1.2.0): Added AAP-17 (pre-final instruction wording), AAP-18 (cross-artifact inconsistency), AAP-19 (canonical source parity violation). Updated Severity Classification and Remediation Patterns tables.

2. **governance/canon/INDEPENDENT_ASSURANCE_AGENT_CANON.md** (v1.6.0 → v1.7.0): Added ACR-09, ACR-10, ACR-11 to Admin-Ceremony Rejection Triggers table.

3. **governance/canon/AGENT_HANDOVER_AUTOMATION.md** (v1.4.1 → v1.5.0): Extended §4.3e Check C with Check C2 (pre-final instruction wording scan); added Check H (cross-artifact final-state consistency) and Check I (canonical source parity); added AAP-15 through AAP-19 to Auto-Fail Rules table.

4. **governance/canon/POST_TOKEN_VOCABULARY_LAW.md** (NEW — v1.0.0): Created vocabulary law defining DENYLIST of pre-final phrases and mandatory post-token replacements.

5. **governance/templates/iaa-wave-record.template.md**: Added ASSEMBLY_TIME_ONLY marker to §3.2 IAA Agent Response section.

6. **governance/templates/execution-ceremony-admin/FOREMAN_ADMIN_READINESS_HANDBACK.template.md** (v1.0.0 → v1.1.0): Added Post-Token Normalization Checkpoint section.

7. **.agent-workspace/execution-ceremony-admin-agent/knowledge/bundle-checklist.md** (v1.0.0 → v1.1.0): Added G-6 gate; added post-token normalization and cross-artifact consistency checklist items.

8. **governance/CANON_INVENTORY.json**: Updated hashes for AGENT_HANDOVER_AUTOMATION.md and INDEPENDENT_ASSURANCE_AGENT_CANON.md; added POST_TOKEN_VOCABULARY_LAW.md entry.
